basic_info.description: 👋 I’m Nishan Paudel, a Software Engineer with 3+ years of industry experience. I have built and maintained large-scale distributed systems and web services. My work spans cloud-native and AI-driven systems using Docker, Kubernetes, Grafana and modern ML frameworks. I am focused on applying machine learning and AI to build scalable and intelligent platforms. Currently pursuing my MSSE with a concentration in AI at San José State University

projects.title: Safeguard AI
bullets: Multi-agent video analysis system using OpenAI, MongoDB, and RAG
Delivers timestamp-cited answers from transcript and frame context
Two-agent orchestration with LangChain and LLaMA for queries

projects.title: Hybrid DDoS IDS
bullets: Hybrid ML and Rule-Based system for real-time DDoS detection
GPU-accelerated training with RAPIDS cuML achieving 99% recall
API-based inference with FastAPI and Kafka for real-time monitoring

projects.title: Restaurant Booking
bullets: Full-stack React/Spring Boot microservice booking system
Real-time search, reservations, and admin workflow
CI/CD with GitHub Actions and AWS auto-scaling deployment

projects.title: GitCast
bullets: Agentic pipeline using Python, LangChain and Claude
Transforms GitHub repos into podcast episodes
FastAPI backends with async workers on AWS Lambda

projects.title: BridgeWorks
bullets: AI-powered platform connecting workers with employers
Built with modern web technologies and cloud deployment

projects.title: Movie Recommender
bullets: Flask app using cosine similarity on MovieLens dataset for personalized movie recommendations
REST API serving recommendations via TMDb IDs with poster images
Content-based filtering using user preferences and movie feature vectors
